sourceMovie.title: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Blade of the Immortal
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends clicked for you, Blade of the Immortal (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Berserk: The Golden Age Arc II - The Battle for Doldrey

Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends?
faq.answer: Try Blade of the Immortal, Berserk: The Golden Age Arc II - The Battle for Doldrey, King Kong vs. Godzilla—each shares DNA with Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends?
faq.answer: Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends (2014) is best described as Action, Adventure, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Rurouni Kenshin Part III: The Legend Ends part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Rurouni Kenshin Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
